mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.real_name, u.avatar, u.phone, u.email, u.gender, u.dept_id, d.name AS dept_name, u.company_id, c.name AS company_name, u.status, u.remark, u.create_time FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON u.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_company c ON u.company_id = c.id
u.deleted = 0
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND u.status = #{status}
AND u.dept_id = #{deptId}
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
